title: Melted Pork Kaiseki Course
description: A unique fusion of Japanese flavors and textures, this kaiseki course features a melt-in-your-mouth pork dish. Perfect for special occasions or dinner parties.

ingredients.name: Pork Belly
ingredients.notes: Braised in a sweet soy sauce

instructions: 2. In a large Dutch oven, combine pork belly, sake, mirin, and 1 tablespoon of sesame oil.
3. Braise pork belly for 2 hours, or until tender and caramelized.
4. Meanwhile, prepare crunchy crispy onions by separating onion rings into individual straws.
5. Fry onion straws in hot oil until crispy, then drain on paper towels.
6. To assemble kaiseki course, place a portion of Japanese rice on a plate, followed by a slice of braised pork belly.
7. Drizzle melted miso sauce over pork belly, then garnish with crispy onions, sesame seeds, and scallions.
